title: Social Media Marketing
shortSummary: Social media is where your customers already spend hours every day. This module teaches you how to choose the right platforms, create engaging content, build a community, and use social media as a genuine business growth tool rather than a vanity metric machine.
whyItMatters: Over 4.9 billion people use social media worldwide. For most businesses, it is the fastest way to build brand awareness, engage with customers, and drive traffic. But posting randomly without a strategy wastes time. Understanding how each platform works, what content performs, and how to measure results separates effective social media marketing from noise.
coreConcepts: Choosing the right platforms for your audience and goals
Platform differences: Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, X, YouTube, Pinterest
Organic versus paid social media strategy
Community management and engagement best practices
Social media algorithms and how they decide what gets shown
